action.reasoning: Observation: local validation for checkpoints that previously scored well is now very low, while hidden eval earlier was ~0.459; this strongly suggests the current inference/model wrapper changed, not necessarily that all weights are bad. Analysis: CLIP vision classifiers must use CLIPVisionModel.pooler_output (post-layernorm CLS). If model.py currently uses a different representation, existing trained classifier weights will look collapsed locally and in final eval. Decision: restore a minimal correct CLIPVisionModel + linear classifier implementation and run a compact local OOD-val sweep over candidate checkpoints to identify the best surviving checkpoint before final submission.
